revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''歳殺神'''（さいせつしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては、'''...'
revision.text:
'''歳殺神'''（さいせつしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては、'''さいせつ'''と書くこともある。[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[大威徳明王]]とされる。同じ八将神の一人である[[大将軍]]と関係があるという。
歳殺神は、[[金星]]（太白星）の精とされるが、金星は陰気の極みであり、この神は殺気をつかさどり、万物を滅するとされる。この神の在位する方角に向かって[[引越し|移転]]、[[旅行]]、[[結婚]]、[[訴訟]]などは避けたほうがよいとされる。また、この神は、[[武]]を好むとされ、この神の在位する方角に向かって[[武器]]や[[刃物]]を得るのは吉とされる。
==歳殺神の在位== 歳殺神の在位する方角は、土の性格を有する丑・未・辰・戌の方角とされる。 *その年の十二支→在位する方角 **子→未 **丑→辰 **寅→丑 **卯→戌 **辰→未 **巳→辰 **午→丑 **未→戌 **申→未 **酉→辰 **戌→丑 **亥→戌
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいせつしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

revision.comment: Created page with "[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|..."
revision.text:
[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|ja|金星}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Year of the {{ill|Zodiac Sign|ja|十二支}} → Direction of Residence ** Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ** Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ** Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ** Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}
[[Category:Deities in Onmyōdō]] [[Category:Venus deities]] {{Japan-culture-stub}} [[ja:歳殺神]]

revision.comment: doing another replacement of the same form to get the straggler pages I made
revision.text:
[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|ja|金星}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Year of the {{ill|Zodiac Sign|ja|十二支}} → Direction of Residence ** Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ** Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ** Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ** Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|ja|金星}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.

[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|ja|金星}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Year of the {{ill|Zodiac Sign|ja|十二支}} → Direction of Residence ** Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ** Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ** Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ** Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ** Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ** Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ** Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌)

It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Year of the {{ill|Zodiac Sign|ja|十二支}} → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}}. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The {{ill|honji|ja|本地|12=draft}} in {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教|12=draft}} is identified as {{ill|Yamantaka|ja|大威徳明王|12=draft}}. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍|1=Daishogun (directional deity)|lt=Daishogun|12=draft}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|ja|金星|12=draft}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|12=draft}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|moving|ja|引越し|12=draft}}, {{ill|traveling|ja|旅行|12=draft}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚|12=draft}}, or {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟|12=draft}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支|12=draft}}: * Year of the {{ill|Zodiac Sign|ja|十二支|12=draft}} → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=draft}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|歳殺神]] '''歳殺神'''（さいせつしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の一人である。暦本によっては、'''さいせつ'''と書くこともある。[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[大威徳明王]]とされる。同じ八将神の一人である[[大将軍 (方位神)|大将軍]]と関係があるという。
歳殺神は、[[金星]]（[[太白|太白星]]）の精とされるが、金星は陰気の極みであり、この神は殺気をつかさどり、万物を滅するとされる。この神の在位する方角に向かって[[引越し|移転]]、[[旅行]]、[[結婚]]、[[訴訟]]などは避けたほうがよいとされる。また、この神は、[[武]]を好むとされ、この神の在位する方角に向かって[[武器]]や[[刃物]]を得るのは吉とされる。
==歳殺神の在位== 歳殺神の在位する方角は、土の性格を有する丑・未・辰・戌の方角とされる。 *その年の[[十二支]]→在位する方角 **子→未 **丑→辰 **寅→丑 **卯→戌 **辰→未 **巳→辰 **午→丑 **未→戌 **申→未 **酉→辰 **戌→丑 **亥→戌
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいせつしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:金星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳殺神]][[zh:歲殺神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q60152]] Wikidata name: Saisetsujin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] in [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]] is identified as [[:en:Yamantaka|Yamantaka]]. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with [[:en:Venus|Venus]], also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金星|1=Venus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q313}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], [[:en:Travel|traveling]], [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Year of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Zodiac Sign]] → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

[[ja:歳殺神]]
<!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--><!--Saisetsujin--> [[Category:Venusian deities]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:歲殺神]] {{wikidata link|Q60152}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳殺神]][[zh:歲殺神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60152]] Wikidata name: Saisetsujin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] in [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]] is identified as [[:en:Yamantaka|Yamantaka]]. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with [[:en:Venus|Venus]], also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金星|1=Venus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q313}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], [[:en:Travel|traveling]], [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Year of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Zodiac Sign]] → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}

Saisatsu Shin is associated with [[:en:Venus|Venus]], also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金星|1=Venus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q313}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], [[:en:Travel|traveling]], [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Year of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Zodiac Sign]] → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳殺神]][[zh:歲殺神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳殺神]][[zh:歲殺神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳殺神]][[zh:歲殺神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60152]] Wikidata name: Saisetsujin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saisatsu.png|thumb|right|170px|Saisatsu Shin]] '''Saisatsu Shin''' (歳殺神, さいせつしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In certain calendars, it may also be written as "さいせつ" (Saisetsu). The [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] in [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]] is identified as [[:en:Yamantaka|Yamantaka]]. It is said to have connections with another of the Eight Guardian Deities, {{ill|Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (Guardian Deity)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}}.
Saisatsu Shin is associated with [[:en:Venus|Venus]], also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金星|1=Venus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q313}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as [[:en:Relocation (personal)|moving]], [[:en:Travel|traveling]], [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Year of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Zodiac Sign]] → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

Saisatsu Shin is associated with {{ill|Venus|en|Venus|WD=Q313|lt=Venus}}, also known as {{ill|Taihaku|ja|太白星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金星|1=Venus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q313}}. Venus represents the peak of yin energy, and this deity governs destructive energy, believed to annihilate all things. It is advised to avoid actions such as {{ill|Relocation (personal)|en|Relocation (personal)|WD=Q2918584|lt=moving}}, {{ill|Travel|en|Travel|WD=Q61509|lt=traveling}}, {{ill|Marriage|en|Marriage|WD=Q8445|lt=marriage}}, or {{ill|Legal proceeding|en|Legal proceeding|WD=Q1301203|lt=lawsuits}} in the direction of this deity's presence. However, Saisatsu Shin is said to favor martial matters, and acquiring weapons or blades in its direction is considered auspicious.
== Saisatsu Shin's Position == Saisatsu Shin is believed to reside in directions corresponding to the earthy branches (丑, 未, 辰, 戌). Its position depends on the year's {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}}: * Year of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Zodiac Sign}} → Direction of Residence ''' Rat (子) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Ox (丑) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Tiger (寅) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Rabbit (卯) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Dragon (辰) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Snake (巳) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Horse (午) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Goat (未) → West-Northwest (戌) ''' Monkey (申) → South-Southwest (未) ''' Rooster (酉) → East-Southeast (辰) ''' Dog (戌) → North-Northeast (丑) ''' Boar (亥) → West-Northwest (戌) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}
